subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular billboard panel dusted with snow along its top edge, its surface bright under flat winter light; blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text vivid against the white; snow-caked monopole above the houses
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right verge, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the snowy verge
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and out of view as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Dashboard under flat winter light, a few melted snow-flecks on the windshield, dark hood nose dusted with snow at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the residential street past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the residential street, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A quiet Scandinavian residential street under a pale overcast winter sky, snow falling lightly and blanketing the roofs, gardens, and snow-packed roadway. Timber and rendered houses in muted reds and ochres line the street behind snow-laden bare birches. Tire tracks cut through the packed snow; the lane markings are hidden beneath it. Beyond the right verge a billboard stands snow-dusted on a monopole above the low houses.

lighting.conditions: Overcast winter daylight with light falling snow
lighting.direction: Flat, diffuse light from the whole sky; no direct sun
lighting.shadows: Essentially shadowless; snow and sky scatter light evenly
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright but flat, high-key white illumination; snow mutes color and the falling flakes soften the distance, while the red stop-sign graphic pops against the white

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Whites and pale greys of snow and sky, muted red-ochre houses, dark birch trunks, with the red stop sign and blue-white ad as vivid accents
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Hushed, cold, calm snowy neighbourhood drive
aesthetics.patterns: Tire tracks in packed snow, snow-laden bare birches, and rows of low houses

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the near road; falling snow softens the far background

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the snowy residential street; the snow-dusted billboard appears small in the right background ahead.
The billboard grows larger as the car approaches, its banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible against the white.
The vehicle continues at steady cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and out of frame without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily on the snow-packed street under overcast snowfall; snow-dusted billboard small in the distance on the right.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard enlarges and the banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable against the snow.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge while the snowy road ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down a snow-covered Scandinavian residential street under pale overcast, snow falling and a snow-dusted billboard small in the right distance. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed, tires crunching over packed snow. At 0:02 the billboard grows larger and its banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it passes out of view while the snowy road ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and the muffled crunch of tires on packed snow, sound deadened by the snowfall, with only faint neighbourhood quiet; no speech or music.
